title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Stryker India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Stryker India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Stryker India South Asia Partners in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Stryker India South Asia Partners:
Stryker India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India South Asia Partners!
